entries.title: Updated UBA Template Now Available
entries.summary: The California Department of Education is pleased to announce that an updated version of the Universal Benefits Application for the SUN Bucks program is now available.

entries.title: Model Policy: Artificial Intelligence In Education
entries.summary: As required by Senate Bill 1288 of 2024, this model policy was drafted by a demographically and experientially diverse group of California teachers, educators, and subject matter experts in conjunction with public comment.

entries.title: Artificial Intelligence
entries.summary: Information regarding the role of artificial intelligence (AI) in California Public Schools.

entries.title: Public Comment–Expanding Fluid Milk Options
entries.summary: The U.S. Department of Agriculture invites public comment on the final rule codifying expanded fluid milk options Child Nutrition Program providers, following enactment of the Whole Milk for Healthy Kids Act.

entries.title: Webinar: Tuesday at 2 School Nutrition Town Hall
entries.summary: School Nutrition Town Hall webinar for School Nutrition Program Operators and Food Service Directors.

entries.summary: Information on upcoming 2026 SUN Bucks Universal Benefits Application Reporting.

entries.title: Free Virtual Training Opportunities
entries.summary: CalFresh Healthy Living Statewide Training is offering partners five new free training opportunities. Trainings include a combination of self-paced work and live online meetings, which include trauma-informed approaches, when possible.

entries.title: Annual FDP Contract Packet Update Due July 31
entries.summary: The California Department of Education (CDE) reminds all participating agencies to submit their 2026–27 Food Distribution Program (FDP) contract in CNIPS by July 31, 2026.

entries.title: Principal Apportionment, Fiscal Year 2025–26
entries.summary: Distribution of funds for local educational agencies (LEAs) in support of the public school system. Includes elementary school, high school and unified school districts; charter schools; and county offices of education.

entries.summary: Background information and updates on issues of interest to the State Board Members.
